title: Everbuild 101 Multi-Purpose Linseed Oil Putty, Natural, 1 kg & Multipurpose Wood Filler – Suitable for Indoor and Outdoor Use – Sandable – Light Stainable – 250ml
features: Product 1: Suitable for glazing single glass into metal, softwood and hardwood window frames
Product 1: Very workable and easier to apply than other linseed oil putties
Product 1: Features added plasticiser to improve adhesion and help prevent cracking
Product 1: Suitable for internal and external use
Product 2: READY TO USE – Comes ready-mixed for easy application making it ideal for sealing nail holes, cracks, gaps and minor imperfections in wood as quickly as you need.
Product 2: SUITABLE FOR INTERIOR AND EXTERIOR USE – Fix blemishes inside and out with this filler which is waterproof when dry.
Product 2: SOLVENT-FREE MIX – Made using a water-based recipe resulting in a non-flammable and low-odour filler.
Product 2: EASY TO APPLY – Simply apply the amount required, smooth it off and leave it to dry before sanding and staining/painting/varnishing as you like.
description: Everbuild 101 Multi-Purpose Linseed Oil Putty, Natural, 1 kg Everbuild 101 Linseed Oil Putty is specially formulated using only the best grade linseed oil, for glazing single glass into metal, softwood and hardwood window frames and features a added plasticiser to improve adhesion and to help prevent cracking. Everbuild 101 Linseed Oil Putty has an extended shelf life and is easier to apply then most competitive putties. It is worth noting that this product is unsuitable for plastic frames, heat absorbing glass, double glazing or frames treated with decorative microporous stains. It is important to always mix contents of pack thoroughly to blend in any surface oil and to refrain from overpainting until a surface skin has formed which can take between 7 and 30 days. Everbuild Multipurpose Wood Filler – Suitable for Indoor and Outdoor Use – Sandable – Light Stainable – 250ml Need to fill an unsightly imperfection in your baseboards or cover a crack in the door? Sika Everbuild Multipurpose Wood Filler is a DIY-er's dream when it comes to small holes, cracks or gaps less than 5mm deep. Depending on the application, this joiners grade ready-to-use filler is easy to use and dries in just 15 minutes. What's more, it can be sanded, stained, varnished or painted in only 2 hours. The water-based formula is solvent-free, meaning it's low odour and non-flammable. And thanks to its waterproof finish, you can use it inside and outside. Also available in 250ml tubs in a range of other wood appearances and colours.
